content:
Scorpio June 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Shift and transition — intimacy deepens, public visibility rises
Key Dates New Moon Jun 14 (Gemini, 8th house) / Full Moon Jun 29 (Capricorn, 3rd house)
Love The 8th house New Moon is your most intimate fresh start of the year
Career Jupiter entering Leo on June 29 opens a year of public visibility
Crystal of the Month Moonstone
Lucky Colors Deep maroon, black, silver
Lucky Number 8
Affirmation I let the depth move; the light is also mine.

This Month’s Energy

Scorpio, June 2026 is depth-and-visibility month. The Super New Moon in Gemini on June 14 falls in your 8th house of intimacy, shared finances, and psychological depth — your most private doorway of the year. Chiron enters Taurus on June 19 (your 7th house), beginning an 8-year healing chapter around partnership. The Capricorn Full Moon on June 29 lights up your 3rd house of communication, and the same day Jupiter enters Leo (your 10th house) — opening a 12-month chapter of public visibility, career expansion, and recognition. Mercury turning retrograde in Cancer (your 9th house) on June 29 means belief-system and travel plans will need reworking. June’s job is to deepen intimacy early, then prepare for the public year ahead.

Key Dates for Scorpio in June 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Scorpio Do / Avoid
Jun 14 Super New Moon in Gemini 8th house — fresh start in intimacy, shared finances, psychological depth; a new chapter with one significant person Do: name a deeper commitment, restructure joint finances, allow vulnerability
Avoid: using intensity to avoid real intimacy
Jun 19 Chiron enters Taurus 7th house — 8-year healing of partnership wounds; the relationship patterns you’ve repeated surface for reworking Do: name the pattern, get couples support if needed, heal the partner-wound
Avoid: blaming your partner for old pain
Jun 29 Capricorn Full Moon + Jupiter enters Leo + Mercury Rx 3rd house communication climax + 12-month public visibility cycle opens; belief/travel plans scramble Do: declare the year’s public intention, document agreements in writing
Avoid: launching a major public project during Mercury Rx
Jun 4 Venus enters Taurus 7th house Venus — partnership love, attraction, magnetism; an important relationship deepens Do: schedule the date night, name the relationship truth, allow softness
Avoid: testing the partner with intensity
Jun 9 Mars enters Virgo 11th house Mars — community and friendship activity spikes; group projects and future-vision work Do: join the group, host the gathering, name the future
Avoid: power struggles in community
Jun 21 Sun enters Cancer 9th house season — belief, study, publishing, long journeys through July Do: read the challenging book, take the course, plan the trip
Avoid: defending a worldview you’ve outgrown

Career & Money

The Super New Moon in Gemini on June 14 falls in your 8th house of shared finances, joint resources, and other people’s money. For Scorpio, this is the year’s biggest doorway for restructuring debts, investments, inheritances, business partnerships, or any shared financial arrangement. Combined with Chiron’s entry into your 7th house on June 19, partnership and money intertwine this month — a business partnership may need honest renegotiation.

Then on June 29, Jupiter enters Leo, your 10th house of career and public reputation, beginning a 12-month chapter of visibility, recognition, and career expansion you haven’t seen since 2014. Promotions, public roles, going out on your own — all favored across the next year. The catch: Mercury turns retrograde in Cancer (your 9th house) the same day, scrambling travel, study, and publishing plans. Declare the year’s intention now; expect the actual launch to begin after July 23. Crystals for wealth can support the work; the practical move is patient documentation.

Love & Relationships

Venus enters Taurus on June 4 — Taurus is your opposite sign, and Venus in your 7th house of partnership is the year’s most romantic placement. For coupled Scorpios, this is the moment to name a deeper commitment. For single Scorpios, an important person may enter your life this month.

The deeper story: the Super New Moon in Gemini on June 14 falls in your 8th house of intimacy — a fresh start in psychological depth, vulnerability, and sexual bond. Then Chiron enters Taurus on June 19 (your 7th house), beginning an 8-year healing chapter around partnership wounds. The relationships that trigger you most are the ones carrying your healing work. Crystals for love can support the opening; the deeper practice is letting one trustworthy person see the wound you usually hide.

Health & Wellness

Scorpio tends to push through exhaustion; June asks for softening. The 8th house New Moon on June 14 activates psychological depth — old grief, unprocessed loss, and emotional material may surface. This is healing, not breakdown. Rest, journaling, and one trusted conversation are medicine now.

Mars entering Virgo on June 9 (your 11th house) supports community as wellness — say yes to gatherings, even when you’d rather isolate. Moonstone, your crystal of the month, holds your inner weather steady through the depth work. The Sun in Cancer from June 21 (your 9th house) brings a need for wider horizons — even a small trip helps. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent low mood belongs with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Moonstone

Why Moonstone fits Scorpio this month. Scorpio carries depth naturally, but June’s 8th-house New Moon asks for vulnerable depth — a softer exposure, not a control. Moonstone, traditionally tied to lunar cycles, emotional tides, and new beginnings, is the stone that holds your inner weather steady through intimacy transitions. Where Citrine would push and Sunstone would heat, Moonstone receives — exactly what an 8th-house New Moon needs.

How to use it during June 2026. Wear Moonstone as a pendant over your lower abdomen (the 8th house area) from June 14 (the 8th-house New Moon) through the end of the month. Place it under your pillow from June 29 (Mercury Rx begins) for dream-supported depth work.

Best date to use it: June 14, the Super New Moon in your 8th house — Moonstone over your lower abdomen for 10 minutes of breathing, naming the depth you’re ready to share.

Read more: Moonstone Meaning and Best Crystals for Scorpio.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Scorpio — June 2026

When: June 14, the Super New Moon in Gemini (your 8th house).
Crystal: Moonstone.
Intention: Open the depth chapter with one person; let intimacy lead.

  1. Cleanse Moonstone under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of June 14.
  2. Set the intention on the 8th house theme: write down one vulnerability you’ve withheld from someone significant — and the conversation you’ll have within 14 days.
  3. Act by having the conversation before the Capricorn Full Moon on June 29. Moonstone in your pocket during the talk.
  4. Reflect at the Full Moon: what depth did the conversation open, and how does it shape the public year ahead (Jupiter in your 10th)? Carry Moonstone during the review.

Shop Scorpio Crystals for June 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Scorpio crystal guide for stones connected with depth, protection, transformation, and emotional release — including the Moonstone that holds you steady through the year’s most intimate doorway. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Scorpio June 2026

Is June 2026 a good month for Scorpio?

Yes — the first three weeks favor depth, intimacy, and shared-finances work. The year’s biggest career chapter (Jupiter entering your 10th house) opens on June 29, but Mercury also turns retrograde that day, so the launch energy arrives in waves.

How will the Gemini New Moon on June 14 affect Scorpio?

It falls in your 8th house of intimacy, shared finances, and psychological depth — your most private fresh start of the year. Name a deeper commitment, restructure joint finances, allow vulnerability.

What does Chiron entering Taurus mean for Scorpio relationships?

Chiron in your 7th house begins an 8-year healing of partnership wounds. The relationships that trigger you most are carrying your healing work — not because partners are the problem, but because the pattern is finally ready to shift.

What is the best crystal for Scorpio in June 2026?

Moonstone — it holds your inner weather steady through the 8th-house intimacy New Moon and supports the vulnerability the month requires. See the full Scorpio crystal guide →

How does Jupiter entering Leo affect Scorpio career?

Jupiter in your 10th house begins a 12-month chapter of public visibility, recognition, and career expansion. Promotions, leadership roles, going out on your own — all favored. Declare the year’s intention; expect the actual launch to begin after July 23.

Should Scorpio make a major financial decision in late June 2026?

Not advised. With Mercury turning retrograde on June 29, any major shared-finance decision (a loan, an investment, a business partnership) made June 27–July 23 will likely need rework. Close what’s already in motion; delay new commitments.
